title: Unable to forward arrow through all files in a file column at subitem level
excerpt: In Monday, when there are multiple files in a subitem file column… it will only allow you to forward arrow through a selection of them. In order to see all you. have to click on file gallery. Team members would like to b…

posts.author: AF-ITM (Angel Fielder)
posts.cookedHtml: In Monday, when there are multiple files in a subitem file column… it will only allow you to forward arrow through a selection of them. In order to see all you. have to click on file gallery. Team members would like to be able to forward arrow through all. Is monday working on resolving this issue?
